name: mail-agent-workspace
description: Cross-platform Codex plugin and daemon for Fastmail-first agent workflows.

scripts.pack:check: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('.artifacts', { recursive: true, force: true })" && corepack pnpm --filter "./packages/*" -r pack --pack-destination ../../.artifacts && node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('.artifacts', { recursive: true, force: true })"
